title: Narcissismus
text:
look at yourself
and kiss the river
look at yourself
you are desperate believer
inane you hide
it shatters your faith
all the roads,
lead to grave
look at yourself
and kiss the broken mirror
look at yourself
and your faith will wither

title: Never Meant To Be
text:
I was never
never meant to be
was never
meant to be alive
world is consistently
devastating me
it constantly
gashing my face

title: Porcupine's Dilemma
text:
And I,
look into void,
I think,
It’s looking at me
 
And I,
stand in front if it
It wants,
me to step In.

title: Wall
text:
Crush my head with wall
Wall that took my life,
My friend is eating his wife,
Im begging for help
 
Wall is crushing my tongue.,
He is kissing her,
with teeth wide open
Trying to, eat her eyes
So she never see, how border falls
So he never be, that one who molds.

title: Philosophical Suicide
text:
He looks at cross,
with pure emotions,
he looks on icons,
like slave in fetters
 
He tries to touch,
the sky that's high
He tries to see
Above the welkin
 
He tries to touch
Thing that's untouched
He tries to use
His mouth to urge
 
On knees
he's standing,
 
He's looking in face
That never existed
 
He's looking in face
That never existed
 
He's looking in face
That never existed
